objective: Add Step 0 Pre-flight to agents/sim-runner.md: check consumer record exists, compare pinned_sha from .hldpro/hldpro-sim.json against canonical docs/hldpro-sim-consumer-pull-state.json, and emit current/mismatch message before any simulation run.
scope_boundary: agents/sim-runner.md — add Step 0 Pre-flight block before existing Step 1
Pre-flight checks .hldpro/hldpro-sim.json existence and pinned_sha against docs/hldpro-sim-consumer-pull-state.json
HALT on missing consumer record; WARNING (not HALT) on SHA mismatch; continue in both cases after warning
out_of_scope: Modifications to docs/hldpro-sim-consumer-pull-state.json or any other canonical state file
Changes to hldpro-sim package source in packages/hldpro-sim/
Changes to any agents other than sim-runner.md
research_summary: Issue #561 added the deployer reference to Step 1 of agents/sim-runner.md. Issue #562 extends the agent with an explicit pre-flight step that validates the consumer record before proceeding. The canonical pinned_sha is in docs/hldpro-sim-consumer-pull-state.json (fed5ead670cf6834e5c73bffcaf64e41cc483fce, v0.1.0). The consumer record path is .hldpro/hldpro-sim.json. SHA mismatch is a soft warning, not a hard HALT, to avoid blocking workflows when redeployment is pending.
research_artifacts: Issue #562: sim-runner pre-flight consumer record + SHA validation

sprints.name: Sprint 1 — Add Step 0 Pre-flight block to sim-runner.md

specialist_reviews.focus: Confirm change is limited to agents/sim-runner.md with no governance surface side effects.

evidence: agents/sim-runner.md is the only file in scope_boundary
No changes to scripts/, packages/, docs/schemas/, or wiki/

specialist_reviews.focus: Verify pre-flight messaging is actionable: HALT message includes full deploy command; mismatch is WARNING not HALT.
specialist_reviews.summary: HALT message includes exact bash command with placeholder args. SHA mismatch is explicitly a WARNING with proceed-anyway behavior. Both paths include the first 8 chars of the relevant SHA for traceability.

Step 0 mismatch message: WARNING (not hard HALT) with sha[:8] for both sides and re-deploy recommendation

alternate_model_review.summary: Tier 1 single-file documentation edit to an agent markdown file. Not a standards change, not a governance surface schema modification. SoM charter does not require alternate-model review for implementation-only agent documentation edits.
evidence: STANDARDS.md §Society of Minds — alternate review required for architecture/standards PRs only

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Edit agents/sim-runner.md to insert Step 0 Pre-flight block before Step 1. Pre-flight checks .hldpro/hldpro-sim.json, compares pinned_sha to canonical docs/hldpro-sim-consumer-pull-state.json, HALTs on missing record, warns on mismatch, continues in both outcome paths after HALT/warning.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Use Edit tool to insert Step 0 Pre-flight block in agents/sim-runner.md before the existing Step 1 section.

material_deviation_rules: If the pre-flight HALT is changed to a WARNING, revert — missing consumer record must be a hard HALT.
If the SHA mismatch is changed to a HALT, revert — mismatch must remain a soft WARNING to avoid blocking workflows.
If any file other than agents/sim-runner.md is modified, open a new issue before proceeding.
If the deployer script path changes, update Step 0 HALT message to match.
